name: healthcare_sensor_fusion_upgrade_stonehaven_lib_eq
premise: Tele-ICU coverage ends at midnight; rural spoke hospitals are asking for a protocol exception to keep higher-acuity patients locally. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare sensor fusion upgrade stonehaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Ansel Navarro
agents.identity: I am Ansel Navarro, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mei Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Mei Kowalski, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if liberty advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for equality.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Ansel Navarro must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Ansel Navarro do?
